description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a woodgrain-patterned finish on its side panels and a vibrant, illustrated front panel. The front showcases a large screen area, likely for gameplay, with a marquee above displaying the title 'DREAM TRAIN' in bold, stylized letters. The control panel is equipped with two joysticks and multiple red and black buttons, suggesting support for two players. Below the controls, the front panel is decorated with a colorful, dreamlike scene featuring abstract shapes, a table, and chairs, evoking a surreal, urban environment. A coin slot and power switch are visible on the lower right of the front panel, indicating its use as a coin-operated machine. The cabinet's overall structure is robust, with a slanted top and a deep base for stability.
description: A classic upright arcade game cabinet with woodgrain sides, a vibrant illustrated front, dual joysticks, and a 'DREAM TRAIN' marquee. The control panel and coin slot are prominently featured.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the woodgrain-patterned panel and the angled top of the cabinet.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'DREAM TRAIN' marquee, large screen area, dual joysticks, multiple buttons, coin slot, and colorful illustrated artwork.
description_view_2: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same woodgrain finish and angled top, and partial visibility of the control panel.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the illustrated artwork on the lower panel, with no visible controls or screen.
attribute_screen_type: unknown (screen area is present but the display type is not visually identifiable; likely flat and medium-sized with a visible bezel)
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two joysticks and eight buttons arranged in two clusters, suitable for two players side-by-side; buttons are red and black with no visible markings.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the text 'DREAM TRAIN' in white and purple with a dreamy, illustrated background matching the front panel's surreal theme.
